issue: EC showed 'confirmado' even when required fields were empty, because renderedDocument.imageDataUrl bypassed field validation
text: The original design treated a stored renderedDocument.imageDataUrl as proof of valid completion and skipped field re-validation. Owner decision (2026-03-31): any empty required field must show as pending, even if a renderedDocument exists. The bypass (!rendered &&) was removed from getDashboardEnergyCertificateSummary (dashboardProject.ts) and buildDashboardSummary (backend/server.js). Additionally, habitableAreaM2, floorCount, and bedroomCount were added as required fields to both validateEcStep (frontend) and isEcDataComplete (backend) so that ALL visible numeric housing inputs must be filled for 'completed' status.
